news.title: Coinbase quantum report flags exchange cold wallets among millions of bitcoin exposed by address reuse

news.title: US Government Orders Anthropic to Pull Claude Fable, Mythos AI Models
news.summary: Anthropic pushed back against what it described as an overreach, saying the vulnerability cited is already widespread across the industry.

news.title: If your still waiting for it to go lower to get in then you will never own any BTC
news.summary:
I’ve talked to several people who didn’t buy at 16K because they thought it would go down to 12.5K
A few more who never bought in Jan 2024 because they thought it would break below 30K
I just talked to another friend who said it should come down to 55K, then I’ll buy.
What if it doesn’t?
If you’re one of these people, you want to invest but think you can wait till the bottom to go all in, you will miss out.
This is a great level. Es

news.title: Bitcoin ETF Outflows Are Now at Record Levels. Time to Panic, or Time to Buy the Dip?
news.summary:
Key Points

  • Bitcoin exchange-traded funds saw a lot of outflows recently.

  • There may be more outflows on the way.

  • The outflows coincided with the price of the coin falling significantly.
